notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez grounds into a double play, first baseman Nick Kurtz to shortstop Alika Williams. Moisés Ballesteros out at 2nd. Pedro Ramírez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki singles on a ground ball to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom. Kevin Alcántara to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pete Crow-Armstrong walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Pete Crow-Armstrong singles on a fly ball to right fielder Lawrence Butler. Seiya Suzuki scores. Dansby Swanson to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil grounds into a double play, second baseman Nico Hoerner to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Zack Gelof out at 2nd. Jeff McNeil out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Shea Langeliers inside-the-park HR
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers hits an inside-the-park home run (16) on a fly ball to center field. Henry Bolte scores.

notableEvents.label: Lawrence Butler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler grounds out, shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: Brent Rooker pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brent Rooker grounds out, third baseman Alex Bregman to first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Pete Crow-Armstrong singles on a fly ball to right fielder Lawrence Butler. Seiya Suzuki scores. Dansby Swanson to 3rd.
